title: DT2 8WG, Nuclear Restoration Services Limited environmental permit variation advertisement – EPR/PB3898DC/V004
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on certain variations (changes) to radioactive substances permits.  The arrangements are explained in their Public Participation Statement  These notices explain:    what the variation is about   how to view and comment on the proposed variation   when you need to comment by    The Environment Agency will decide:    whether to grant or refuse the application   what conditions to include in the permit (if granted)   "
